auth.label: Authorization Token
auth.description: Dart authorization token sent as a Bearer token. Copy it from Dart Settings > Account: https://app.dartai.com/?settings=account.

actions.name: create_task
actions.description: Create a Dart task using the official item wrapper.

actions.name: list_tasks
actions.description: List Dart tasks with documented filters, ordering, and pagination.

assignee.description: Filter by assignee name or email.

reviewer.description: Filter by reviewer name or email.

in_trash.description: Filter by whether tasks are in trash.

start_at_after.description: Filter tasks starting after this timestamp.

start_at_before.description: Filter tasks starting before this timestamp.

due_at_after.description: Filter tasks due after this timestamp.

due_at_before.description: Filter tasks due before this timestamp.

created_at_after.description: Filter tasks created after this timestamp.

created_at_before.description: Filter tasks created before this timestamp.

updated_at_after.description: Filter tasks updated after this timestamp.

updated_at_before.description: Filter tasks updated before this timestamp.

no_defaults.description: Whether Dart should skip its default filters and ordering.

items.description: A documented Dart task ordering field.

limit.description: The maximum number of tasks to return.

inputSchema.description: Filters and pagination for listing Dart tasks.

count.description: The total number of matching tasks.
